---
title: cloître
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557416/henri4_20180125_irzcwg.png
description: Cloître du lycée Henri IV, Paris 5
categories: ["urbansketching"]
date: 2018/01/25
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557416/henri4_20180125_irzcwg.png)
